title: AURORA Aurora, 12170, Mini Flopsie Meerkat, 8In, Soft Toy, Brown, 8-Inch
features: From Aurora’s highly popular Mini Flopsies Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials.
Realistic animal with soft and cuddly bean bag bodies.
Children will love this cute and hugely collectible animal.
description: Product Description Aurora World’s highly popular Mini Flopsies range brings you an extremely cute and cuddly Meerkat. Made using the finest plush materials, this golden brown and beige Meerkat has a floppy bean bag body and is perfect as a gift. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products. Box Contains 1 x Soft Toy
